provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Regulations may be cited as the Broadcasting (Fees) Regulations.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content:
2. Interpretation
In these Regulations, unless the context otherwise requires—
"foreign public broadcasting service" means a foreign broadcasting service provided by any statutory body which is funded either wholly or partly through State revenues;
"industry development fee" means a fee imposed on a foreign broadcaster to help to finance training and research into the broadcasting industry's market needs and to help to stimulate and promote local production; and

definitions.definition: a foreign broadcasting service provided by any statutory body which is funded either wholly or partly through State revenues
a fee imposed on a foreign broadcaster to help to finance training and research into the broadcasting industry's market needs and to help to stimulate and promote local production
